MATCH (node1:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2"})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2.2.2.1.1.3.3.1"})
WITH node1.string_id AS n1s, node2.string_id AS n2s
MATCH (r:TreeNode)
WHERE r.depth = 0
AND (n1s = r.string_id OR n1s STARTS WITH (r.string_id + '.'))
AND (n2s = r.string_id OR n2s STARTS WITH (r.string_id + '.'))
RETURN COUNT(r) > 0 AS sameSubtree

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {integer_id: 6})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {integer_id: 51})
WITH node1.integer_id AS n1i, node2.integer_id AS n2i
MATCH (ancestor:TreeNode)
WHERE ancestor.integer_id < n1i
AND ancestor.integer_id < n2i
AND ancestor.upper_bound >= n1i
AND ancestor.upper_bound >= n2i
WITH ancestor LIMIT 1
RETURN ancestor IS NOT NULL
AS sameSubtree

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {id: 3})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {id: 86})
RETURN
EXISTS { MATCH (node1)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(node2) }
OR
EXISTS { MATCH (node2)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(node1) }
AS isAncestorRelationship

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2"})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2.2.2.1.1.3.3.1"})
WITH node1.string_id AS n1s, node2.string_id AS n2s
RETURN
(n1s STARTS WITH (n2s + '.')) OR (n2s STARTS WITH (n1s + '.')) AS isAncestorRelationship;

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {integer_id: 6})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {integer_id: 51})
RETURN
(node2.integer_id > node1.integer_id AND
node2.integer_id <= node1.upper_bound)
OR
(node1.integer_id > node2.integer_id AND
node1.integer_id <= node2.upper_bound)
AS isAncestorRelationship

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {id: 3})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {id: 86})
MATCH (node1)-[:HAS_CHILD*0..]->(ancestor:TreeNode)<-[:HAS_CHILD*0..]-(node2)
RETURN COUNT(ancestor) > 0
AS sameSubtree

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2"})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2.2.2.1.1.3.3.1"})
WITH node1.string_id AS n1s, node2.string_id AS n2s
MATCH (r:TreeNode)
WHERE r.depth = 0
AND (n1s = r.string_id OR n1s STARTS WITH (r.string_id + '.'))
AND (n2s = r.string_id OR n2s STARTS WITH (r.string_id + '.'))
RETURN COUNT(r) > 0 AS sameSubtree

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {integer_id: 6})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {integer_id: 51})
WITH node1.integer_id AS n1i, node2.integer_id AS n2i
MATCH (ancestor:TreeNode)
WHERE ancestor.integer_id < n1i
AND ancestor.integer_id < n2i
AND ancestor.upper_bound >= n1i
AND ancestor.upper_bound >= n2i
WITH ancestor LIMIT 1
RETURN ancestor IS NOT NULL
AS sameSubtree

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {id: 3})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {id: 86})
RETURN
EXISTS { MATCH (node1)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(node2) }
OR
EXISTS { MATCH (node2)-[:HAS_CHILD*1..]->(node1) }
AS isAncestorRelationship

MATCH (node1:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2"})
MATCH (node2:TreeNode {string_id: "1.2.2.2.1.1.3.3.1"})
WITH node1.string_id AS n1s, node2.string_id AS n2s
RETURN
(n1s STARTS WITH (n2s + '.')) OR (n2s STARTS WITH (n1s + '.')) AS isAncestorRelationship;
